valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 13 Apr 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 14 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low 50 miles south of Iceland 994 losing its identity

Wind
Southerly or southeasterly 4 to 6, decreasing 3 at times, then becoming variable 2 to 4 later.
Sea state
Rough at first in northeast, otherwise slight or moderate.
Weather
Showers then rain.
Visibility
Good, becoming moderate or poor for a time.
